action.reasoning: Observation: MSE-optimized LGB (1000 trees, full 2008-2021 train) reached ic_mean=0.0368 (best so far). Analysis: MSE poorly aligned with cross-sectional IC; 2021 data was leaked into training previously; custom IC feval on held-out 2021 valid for early-stopping + more rounds/lower LR will better optimize the target metric and reduce overfitting. Decision: Overwrite train.py to use direct lgb.train() with train=2008-2020/valid=2021 split, custom pearsonr IC metric (higher better) for feval+early_stop(200), 5000 rounds/lr=0.01/num_leaves=64, record evals to metrics.jsonl; run training then submit_eval.
